global.description: The ad features a bold logo and promotional text against a simple background.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock items at a special price.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: A prominent logo featuring the word 'ZenDrop' in bold, modern typography, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Limited stock notice
elements.description: A bold headline stating 'Limited stock' in a clear, attention-grabbing font, located below the logo.

elements.label: Shop bestsellers text
elements.description: A smaller text line that reads 'Shop bestsellers now' in a simple, readable font, placed beneath the headline.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A price tag displaying '€29.99' in a prominent font, positioned below the body text.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Book now' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A subtle background shape that adds depth to the ad, featuring soft curves and a muted color.

elements.label: Additional background element
elements.description: A secondary decorative element that complements the main background, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Top corner element
elements.description: A small decorative element located in the top corner, possibly a graphic or icon.

elements.label: Main ad content
elements.description: The central area of the ad that contains the main promotional message and visuals.
elements.text_content: Limited stock Shop bestsellers now €29.99 Book now

elements.label: ZenDrop title
elements.description: The title 'ZenDrop' in large, bold letters, dominating the top section of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and minimalistic, ZenDrop logo, limited stock notice, price tag.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, body text, price, and CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ZenDrop, Limited stock, Shop bestsellers now, €29.99, Book now
